data.body: Sixth review advisory disposition: accepted all six substantive clarifications. The plan now places the 0.80 floor specifically in normal Pass-3 blocking-threshold resolution without changing novelty/completion floors; updates plan_review_phase only from the winning process_status branch; defines closed pin-health verdicts; uses upheld prerequisite finding terminology; maps pre-sign LockTimeout to retryable unsigned; and documents/tests rollback safety for snapshots carrying the additive projection. These material edits invalidate the prior certificate, so the epic will be reviewed and independently verified again before any child review.
